questions.question: Why doesn't scoped CSS from a parent component style elements inside a child component?
options: Scoped CSS is disabled for third-party components by default
Vue adds a data-v-xxxxx attribute only to the current component's elements, not child elements
Child components have higher CSS specificity and override parent styles
CSS inheritance is blocked by the Shadow DOM encapsulation

questions.question: What is the correct CSS selector syntax to style a child component's internal elements from a scoped parent?
Which child component element IS affected by parent scoped CSS without needing :deep()?
options: All elements with a matching class name
Slotted content passed from the parent
